rows.CNzh: 呼……好累。
rows.TWzh: 呼……好累。
rows.JPja: ふう… <Ruby={2:4}つか>疲れた
rows.USen: Goodness, I'm beat.

rows.CNzh: 下雨了吗……
rows.TWzh: 下雨了啊……
rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:4}あめ>雨か…
rows.USen: Of course it's raining.

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>おお… <Ruby={2:4}きみ>君も<Ruby={2:2}き>来たのか
やはり ゾナウに<Ruby={2:4}つよ>強い<Ruby={4:8}きょうみ>興味があるようだな
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>Ah, so you're here. Came to learn about
the Zonai from an expert, I gather?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:263]>那么欢迎你加入，
请看——这里是我们的调查据点。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:263]>那就讓我歡迎你吧！
看，這裡就是我們的調查據點。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:263]>ならば<Ruby={4:8}かんげい>歓迎しよう
<Ruby={2:2}み>見たまえ ここが<Ruby={4:8}われわれ>我々の<Ruby={8:16}ちょうさきょてん>調査拠点だ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]>I should welcome you to our humble base
of operations. Behold! This is where the
real investigation starts.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:259]>和旁边的<Color=red>鸟望台<Color=white>比起来……
可能是略显逊色了一些。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:259]>和建在旁邊的出色<Color=red>鳥望台<Color=white>比起來……
或許真的有那麼一點遜色也說不定……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:259]><Ruby={2:6}となり>隣に<Ruby={2:2}た>建つ<Ruby={4:6}りっぱ>立派な<Color=red><Ruby={6:14}ちょうぼうだい>鳥望台<Color=white>に<Ruby={2:4}くら>比べれば…
ほんの<Ruby={2:4}すこ>少しばかり <Ruby={4:6}みおと>見劣りするかもしれないが
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:259]>It might not seem like much next to that
<Color=red>Skyview Tower<Color=white>, I'll concede.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>今后，我们会以这里为中心开展调查活动。<unk[5:0]>
塔乌洛也早已经前往左纳乌遗迹群了。
我记得他说过要从
<Color=red>卡兹溜湖<Color=white>附近开始调查来着……
往<Color=red>东南方<Color=white>走，应该就能到达左纳乌遗迹群了。

<unk[3:0:12]>环卡遗迹指引的龙之地，
会有什么关于魔王及塞尔达殿下的线索呢……
我倒是很想尽快去调查，但是……

<unk[3:0:10]>我为着建立据点的事就已经感到有些劳累了，
还是稍微休息一下再去调查吧。
<Size=80>真是的……
塔乌洛的字典里就没有“累”这个字吗？<Size=100>
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>今後將以這裡為中心進行調查，<unk[5:0]>
塔烏洛也已經前往左納烏遺跡群了。
我記得他說會從<Color=red>卡茲溜湖<Color=white>
那一帶開始調查……
只要往<Color=red>東南方<Color=white>前進，應該就能抵達左納烏遺跡群了。

<unk[3:0:12]>環卡遺跡所指引的龍之地……
到底有什麼與魔王和薩爾達殿下相關的線索呢……
真想趕快前往調查！

<unk[3:0:10]>但是建造據點讓我有點累了……
所以我打算稍事休息再前往調查。
<Size=80>真是的……
塔烏洛未免也太有活力了吧……<Size=100>
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><Ruby={4:6}こんご>今後は ここを<Ruby={4:10}ちゅうしん>中心に<Ruby={8:16}ちょうさかつどう>調査活動を<Ruby={2:6}おこな>行うことになる<unk[5:0]>
タウロ<Ruby={2:4}くん>君も <Ruby={4:8}さっそく>早速ゾナウ<Ruby={6:10}いせきぐん>遺跡群に<Ruby={2:2}む>向かったよ
たしか <Color=red>カズリュー<Ruby={2:2}こ>湖<Color=white>のあたりから
<Ruby={4:8}ちょうさ>調査を<Ruby={2:4}はじ>始めると<Ruby={2:2}い>言っていたよ
<Color=red><Ruby={4:8}なんとう>南東<Color=white>へ<Ruby={2:4}すす>進めば ゾナウ<Ruby={6:10}いせきぐん>遺跡群にたどり<Ruby={2:2}つ>着くはずだ

<unk[3:0:12]>ワッカ<Ruby={4:6}いせき>遺跡が<Ruby={2:4}おし>教えてくれた <Ruby={2:6}りゅう>龍の<Ruby={2:2}ち>地に
<Ruby={4:6}まおう>魔王やゼルダ<Ruby={2:4}さま>様に<Ruby={2:4}つな>繋がる <Ruby={2:4}なに>何かがあるのか…
<Ruby={4:8}いっこく>一刻も<Ruby={2:4}はや>早く <Ruby={4:8}ちょうさ>調査に<Ruby={2:2}い>行きたいとは<Ruby={2:4}おも>思うのだがね

<unk[3:0:10]><Ruby={2:6}わたし>私は<Ruby={4:8}きょてん>拠点づくりで<Ruby={6:16}しょうしょうつか>少々疲れてしまったよ…
<Ruby={4:8}ちょうさ>調査には <Ruby={2:4}すこ>少し<Ruby={2:4}やす>休んでから<Ruby={2:2}む>向かうとしよう
<Size=80>まったく…
タウロ<Ruby={2:4}くん>君は<Ruby={2:4}つか>疲れというものをしらんのだろうか<Size=100>
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>Going forward, our research will proceed
from here. <unk[5:0]>Tauro has already gone off to
the Zonai Ruins.<PageBreak>If memory serves, he spoke of starting his
investigation around <Color=red>Dracozu Lake<Color=white>.<PageBreak>Go <Color=red>southeast <Color=white>and you should find the
Zonai Ruins he volunteered to inspect.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:12]>I'm curious if the "dragon land" written of
at the Ring Ruin will have any more leads
on the Demon King or Princess Zelda.<PageBreak>Ordinarily, I'd be right there at his side in
the field, of course.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:10]>But I'm worn out from setting up the base.
I'll need some time to recuperate before
I begin my own survey.<PageBreak><Size=80>Goodness me, is there anything at all that slows
down Tauro?<Size=100>

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>今后，我们会以这里为中心开展调查活动。<unk[5:0]>
塔乌洛也早已经前往左纳乌遗迹群了。
我记得他说过要从
<Color=red>卡兹溜湖<Color=white>附近开始调查来着……
具体的地方我也不知道，
但往<Color=red>东南方<Color=white>走，肯定就能到达左纳乌遗迹群了。
<unk[3:0:12]>不过……入夜了他都没回来，
难道是一直在进行调查吗……？
<Size=80>真是的……塔乌洛的字典里就没有“累”这个字吗？<Size=100>
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>今後將以這裡為中心進行調查，<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:12]>可是……天都已經黑了，他卻還沒回來。
該不會還在繼續調查吧……？
<Size=80>真是的……塔烏洛未免也太有活力了吧？<Size=100>

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>Going forward, our research will proceed
from here. <unk[5:0]>Tauro has already gone off to
the Zonai Ruins.<PageBreak>If memory serves, he spoke of starting his
investigation around <Color=red>Dracozu Lake<Color=white>.<PageBreak>I don't know his exact whereabouts, but
if you go <Color=red>southeast<Color=white>, you should find the
Zonai Ruins he volunteered to inspect.
<unk[3:0:12]>That said...it's night now and he hasn't
returned, which is worrying. Did he get
swept up in his work at the site?<PageBreak><Size=80>My goodness, the man is absolutely indefatigable.<Size=100>

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:12 78 111 116 105 99 101]>还有什么事吗？

关于<Color=red>鸟望台<Color=white>，我是一概不知，
而且<Color=red>塔乌洛<Color=white>也不在这里。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:12 78 111 116 105 99 101]>還有什麼事情嗎？

<Color=red>鳥望台<Color=white>跟我一點關係也沒有，
<Color=red>塔烏洛<Color=white>也不在這裡喔。

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>Tauro has already gone off to the
Zonai Ruins.<PageBreak>He spoke of starting his investigation
around <Color=red>Dracozu Lake<Color=white>.<PageBreak>Go <Color=red>southeast <Color=white>and you should find the
Zonai Ruins he volunteered to inspect.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:12]>I'm curious if the "dragon land" written of
at the Ring Ruin will have any more leads
on the Demon King or Princess Zelda.<PageBreak>Ordinarily, I'd be right there at his side in
the field, of course.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:10]>Setting up our base here was more tiring
than I expected. I still haven't recuperated
from the stress.<PageBreak><Size=80>I can't help but think about all the great discoveries
I'm missing out on. Ah, well...fieldwork never was
my strong suit, I suppose. *sigh*<Size=100>

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>塔乌洛已经先去左纳乌遗迹群了。

我记得他说过要从
<Color=red>卡兹溜湖<Color=white>附近开始调查来着……
具体的地方我也不知道，
但往<Color=red>东南方<Color=white>走，肯定就能到达左纳乌遗迹群了。
<unk[3:0:12]>不过……入夜了他都没回来，
难道是一直在进行调查吗……？
<Size=80>我实在没有体力干这种彻夜的实地考察……
说实话，我还是更想搞文献工作……<Size=100>
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>找塔烏洛的話，他已經先去左納烏遺跡群了

我記得他說預計要從<Color=red>卡茲溜湖<Color=white>
那一帶開始調查……
我也不清楚詳細的地點，
不過只要往<Color=red>東南方<Color=white>前進應該就能抵達左納烏遺跡群。
<unk[3:0:12]>可是……天都已經黑了，他卻還沒回來。
該不會還在繼續調查吧……？
<Size=80>我可沒有那個體力熬夜調查……
其實我比較適合進行文獻研究……<Size=100>

<Ruby={4:8}ちょうさ>調査を<Ruby={2:4}はじ>始める<Ruby={4:6}よてい>予定とか<Ruby={2:2}い>言っていたか…

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>Tauro has already gone off to the
Zonai Ruins.<PageBreak>If memory serves, he spoke of starting his
investigation around <Color=red>Dracozu Lake<Color=white>.<PageBreak>I don't know his exact whereabouts, but
if you go <Color=red>southeast<Color=white>, you should find the
Zonai Ruins he volunteered to inspect.
<unk[3:0:12]>That said...it's night now, and he hasn't
returned, which is worrying. Did he get
swept up in his work at the site?<PageBreak><Size=80>Why must all our work be so taxing? Does no one
need an old hand at reviewing and cross-referencing
ancient documents?<Size=100>

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:11]>什么……你已经和塔乌洛见过面了？
而且他还说不一会儿就有了新发现……！？
唔唔……环卡遗迹指引的龙之地……
我也想尽早去调查……
<unk[3:0:10]>不过……先等我休息一下再说。
调查必须做好万全准备。
<Size=80>一想到有大发现在等着我，其实还挺兴奋的……
可我根本就不擅长实地考察……唉。<Size=100>
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:11]>什麼，你已經跟塔烏洛碰面了！？
而且這麼快就有了新發現！？
嗯……環卡遺跡所指引的龍之地……
我也想趕快前往調查……
<unk[3:0:10]>不過……我還是多休息一點再動身吧，
進行調查時必須讓自己是萬全的狀態。
<Size=80>雖然想到有大發現正等著我挖掘，就讓我興奮難耐……
但是我根本就不擅長實地調查啊……唉。<Size=100>

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:11]>Eh? You've already met with Tauro?
And the two of you have begun to make
progress at the ruins?!<PageBreak>*sigh* At least there's still the "dragon
land" mentioned at the Ring Ruin to
survey. I wish I could get a head start.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:10]>Perhaps once I've rested just a bit more.
I'll need to be at my best—I must bring
all my powers of observation to bear.<PageBreak><Size=80>Ugh. I just know I'm missing out on so many

was my strong suit, I suppose. *sigh*<Size=100>
